creator: clive@CirX.ORG
text:
It seems that an md5 error of xc/3.3.3-3.3.3.1.diff.gz.
	After I re-makesum, everyting also works well.
	The ports is build, and no noise remains.

How-To-Repeat: 
	under /usr/ports/x11/XttXF86srv-[any X server],
	      /usr/ports/x11/XFree86
	
	while I try to install/build these ports,
	the system returned something like that:

===>  Extracting for XFree86-3.3.3.1
